case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. YESSENIA EDITH CANO DE LEON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON, YESSENIA EDITH CANO $1,225.15 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,310.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT YESSENIA EDITH CANO DE LEON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
